mode_rationale: TPRD §1 declares 'Request Mode: A — New package'. §16 confirms Mode A semver verdict ACCEPT 1.0.0. Target package motadata_py_sdk.resourcepool does not yet exist in the target SDK; this run creates it.
notes: Mode A — greenfield Python pilot. Phase 0.5 (sdk-existing-api-analyzer-python) is skipped. New-export list mirrors TPRD §5.1–§5.4 declarations; semver baseline 1.0.0 per §16.
